tools.name: playbook_create
tools.description: Create an action playbook — a trigger→action rule that tells the assistant how to handle incoming messages matching a pattern

trigger.description: Pattern or description that triggers this playbook (e.g. "meeting request", "from:ceo@*", "newsletter")

action.description: What to do when the trigger matches — natural language action description (e.g. "check calendar, propose 3 times")

channel.description: Channel this rule applies to (e.g. "email", "slack"), or "*" for all channels. Defaults to "*".

category.description: Free-form category for grouping (e.g. "scheduling", "triage"). Defaults to "general".

autonomy_level.description: How much autonomy: "auto" = execute automatically, "draft" = draft for review, "notify" = notify only. Defaults to "draft".

priority.description: Relative priority — higher numbers take precedence. Defaults to 0.

tools.name: playbook_list
tools.description: List action playbooks, optionally filtered by channel or category

channel.description: Filter by channel (e.g. "email", "slack"). Omit to show all.

category.description: Filter by category (e.g. "scheduling", "triage"). Omit to show all.

tools.name: playbook_update
tools.description: Update an existing action playbook rule

playbook_id.description: ID of the playbook to update (from playbook_list results)
ID of the playbook to delete (from playbook_list results)
